title: Untitled (drawing orphan)
html:
Empty Apple Note from March 24, 2020 containing only a com.apple.drawing.2 placeholder — a sketch made during early lockdown but the image never re-imported. One of several covid pandemic era sketch orphans in the Yahir corpus.

yahir gonzalez · covid pandemic era · 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist
